elements.text:

Application delivery is 87 man-day, 217,500 CNY
Project management is 19 man-day, 47,500 CNY
SAP delivery is man-day 35 man-day, 103,600 CNY
Based on currently schedule, billing plan as below
2023-03-15, 106 man-day, 265,000 CNY
